title: More Doors
description: A Fabric & Forge Mod which adds a variety of new Doors & Trapdoors perfect for Building and Decoration.
body:
More Doors is a Minecraft Mod compatible with both Forge & Fabric which adds 54 New Doors & Trapdoors to the game,

Doors include, Metal Doors, Stone Doors, Glass/Transparent Doors, Nether + End Doors and many more! (Full list below).

 

 

 

Adds Gold, Diamond, Lapis, Copper, Netherite, Emerald, Redstone, Coal, Stone, Cobblestone, Andesite, Diorite, Granite, Sandstone, Red Sandstone, Cobbled Deepslate, Calcite, Polished Deepslate, Basalt, Blackstone, Netherrack, End Stone, Purpur, Quartz, Nether Brick, Prismarine, Bookshelf, Amethyst, Smooth Stone, Obsidian, Brick, Ice, Glass, Bedrock, Sponge, Sculk and Dripstone Doors & Trapdoors. Also adds Black, Blue, Brown, Cyan, Gray, Green, Light Blue, Light Gray, Lime, Magenta, Orange, Pink, Purple, Red, White, Yellow and Tinted Glass Doors & Trapdoors.

 

To Craft:

Doors, 2x3 shape with the corresponding material.

Trapdoors, 2x2 or 2x3 shape due to conflicting recipes with the vanilla game.

Gold, Diamond Lapis, Copper, Emerald, Redstone & Coal Doors + Trapdoors are crafted with their item (e.g. gold ingot) while all other doors are crafted with their block (e.g. stone).  Netherite Doors +Trapdoors are crafted by upgrading a Diamond Door/Trapdoor in a Smithing table.

Only Required for Fabric Versions

Please leave some feedback in the comments or on the Discord:

Consider supporting me on Ko-fi to show your appreciation and help support development!

Feel free to use in ModPacks as long as I am credited.
